jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at 3M India Healthcare
jsonLd.description:
3M India Healthcare, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About 3M India Healthcare:
3M India Healthcare is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 3M India Healthcare!
